title: Review AWS infrastructure architecture and resource allocation
description: Walk through the current AWS spend report and propose three architectural changes that reduce monthly cost without hurting reliability.

title: Audit Kubernetes cluster security and RBAC policies
description: Inventory cluster roles, identify over-privileged service accounts, and write up findings against CIS benchmarks.

title: Plan Q3 capacity model
description: Model expected traffic for Q3 and draft a capacity proposal covering Kubernetes nodes and database read replicas.

title: Migrate Terraform modules to v1.7
description: Bump providers, fix deprecations, and re-plan all environments.

title: Set up monitoring dashboards for production services
description: Bring up Grafana dashboards for the top five production services with SLO-aligned panels.

title: Refactor design system tokens
description: Move the design tokens into the new shared package and migrate the shell to consume them.

title: Update operational runbook
description: Document the steps to rotate IAM credentials and refresh Kubernetes secrets across the AWS production cluster.

title: Audit CDN cache configuration for SPA deploys

title: Bootstrap Terraform state backend

title: Rotate root credentials immediately
description: Suspected exposure — rotate root credentials across the AWS organization today.

description: Run the quarterly retro session with the infrastructure crew and capture action items.

title: Upgrade Kubernetes control plane
description: Plan and execute a minor-version upgrade of all production Kubernetes control planes.

title: Modernize legacy mainframe COBOL batch jobs
description: Identify which legacy mainframe COBOL batch jobs can be retired or rewritten, and produce a phased migration plan.
Check AWS production cluster cost report and identify optimization candidates.
